value="<div><font style="font-size: 17px;"><b>Legend</b></font></div><div><br></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 15px;">- <b>frame_size</b> = edge_size * 2 + decor_size - means the non-content size.</font><br><font style="font-size: 15px;">- <b>logical_*</b> means the size or position in surface-local units before scaling is applied.</font><br><font style="font-size: 15px;">- <b>pixel_* </b>means a size in buffer pixels after applying the current surface scale and rounding to an integer.</font></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 15px;">- <b>visible_* </b>means a derived value that depends on whether optional chrome is currently shown.</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="410" x="920" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> div.font: - frame_size = edge_size * 2 + decor_size - means the non-content size.
- logical_* means the size or position in surface-local units before scaling is applied.
- pixel_* means a size in buffer pixels after applying the current surface scale and rounding to an integer.
- visible_* means a derived value that depends on whether optional chrome is currently shown.
